stemHtml: Per ICAO Annex 9, when a passenger's baggage is delayed or mishandled, the resulting unaccompanied baggage will…

options.b: not be loaded in the hold and will be returned to the owner since baggage must travel with its owner.
options.c: not be cleared and will be subject to the taxes of the Contracting State.
options.d: be cleared only if it weighs less than 12 kg.
